mapper.sql: select menu_id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, router_path, component, query_param, route_name, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, menu_status, ifnull(perms, '') as perms, icon, create_time from sys_menu
mapper.select:
select * from sys_menu
AND menu_name like concat('%', #{menuName}, '%')
AND menu_status = #{menuStatus}
order by parent_id, order_num
select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id where m.menu_status = '0' and rm.role_id = #{roleId}

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.router_path, m.component, m.query_param, m.route_name, m.menu_status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.menu_status = 0 order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.router_path, m.component, m.query_param, m.route_name, m.menu_status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join sys_role ro on ur.role_id = ro.role_id left join sys_user u on ur.user_id = u.user_id where u.user_id = #{userId} and m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.menu_status = 0 AND ro.role_status = 0 order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
select m.menu_id from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id where rm.role_id = #{roleId} order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.router_path, m.component, m.query_param, m.route_name, m.menu_status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id where rm.role_id = #{roleId} order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.router_path, m.component, m.query_param, m.route_name, m.menu_status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id where rm.role_id = #{roleId} and m.menu_status = 0 order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
